name: Urolithin A obesity vascular mitochondrial registry
summary: Completed randomized triple-masked trial testing urolithin A versus placebo for 28 days in 50 middle-aged adults with obesity, with arterial function and local stiffness as the primary endpoint and vascular, cerebral blood-flow, nitric-oxide, and mitochondrial biomarker secondary endpoints.
population: 50 adults aged 40 to 64 years with obesity

trial_details.expected_results_window: The registry listed actual completion on May 14, 2025 and had no posted results in the June 10, 2026 API view.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Posted results could clarify whether urolithin A changes vascular and mitochondrial biomarkers in a metabolically stressed middle-aged population, but current no-results status cannot improve the public evidence stage.
